feed.title: Social Trading Vlog
feed.subtitle: Copy trading education and honest eToro reviews by Tom West.

entry.title: Copy Trading Updates
entry.summary: Regular copy trading updates from Tom — real portfolio updates documenting his experience using eToro's copy trading feature since 2017.

entry.title: How to Take Profits from eToro Copy Trading (2026 Guide)
entry.summary: How to withdraw profits from copy trading on eToro without closing your copies. Step-by-step: pause, remove funds, or close — which method keeps your gains safest.

entry.title: What is Social Trading? A Beginner's Guide
entry.summary: What is social trading? A beginner's guide to how social trading works, the history behind it, the risks, costs and benefits — explained simply by a real trader.

entry.title: eToro Popular Investor Program 2026: All 4 Tiers, Requirements & Earnings
entry.summary: The eToro Popular Investor Program pays you up to 2% AUM annually for being copied. All 4 tiers explained — Cadet to Elite — with real requirements, equity thresholds, and what you actually earn.

entry.title: Is eToro a Scam or Legit? Honest Verdict After 9 Years (2026)
entry.summary: Is eToro a scam or legit? After 9 years using the platform with real money — deposits, withdrawals, copy trading — here's my honest verdict with proof.

entry.title: What is Copy Trading? How it Works
entry.summary: What is copy trading? How it works, how it developed, and what to watch out for — explained by a real eToro user who has been copy trading since 2017.

entry.title: eToro Copy Trading Returns: Real Profit Data 2019-2026
entry.summary: How much can you realistically make copy trading on eToro? Real return data from 2019-2026, why most people get the maths wrong, and what $1,000 invested actually returns.

entry.title: Copy Trading Update — 29 Dec 2025
entry.summary: Copy trading update — 29 December 2025. ETH staking explained, Thomas Parry-Jones update, eToro euro accounts, and answering viewer questions.

entry.title: Copy Trading Update — 11 Dec 2025
entry.summary: Copy trading update — 11 December 2025. Closing Ethereum and copy trades to fund renovations, Thomas Parry-Jones at 49% for the year, and life lessons.

entry.title: Copy Trading Update — 01 Sep 2025
entry.summary: Copy trading update — 1 September 2025. Ethereum swings from -$700 to +$815, Trump's crypto moves and the CBDC debate, new copy of Triangula Capital, and 16.46% for the year.

entry.summary: Copy trading update — 24 August 2019. Gold, silver and portfolio decisions documented honestly.
